create_pdf.description: Creates a PDF file using the provided content.

create_text_file.description: Creates a text file using the provided content.

create_html_file.description: Creates an HTML file using the provided content.

create_csv_file.description: Creates a CSV file using the provided content.

create_json_file.description: Creates a JSON file using the provided content.

create_markdown_file.description: Creates a markdown file using the provided content.

send_email.description: Sends email and automatically attaches files generated in the current request.
